message:
feat(embed): add FastEmbed ONNX embedder and workspace lib module

Introduces a new ONNX-based embedding backend powered by FastEmbed,
supporting multiple model architectures for semantic search bake-offs:

- MiniLM-L6-v2 (384 dims, baseline quality tier)
- Snowflake Arctic Embed S (384 dims, bake-off candidate)
- Nomic Embed Text v1.5 (768 dims, bake-off candidate)

The embedder loads ONNX + tokenizer assets from a local model directory,
supports both legacy (model.onnx at root) and current (onnx/model.onnx)
layouts, and implements the frankensearch-core Embedder trait with
configurable pooling and dimension parameters via OnnxEmbedderConfig.

Also adds the workspace-level crates/lib.rs module file for crate
re-exports and shared plumbing across the frankensearch crate family.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
